name: scrapingbee
description: Official ScrapingBee CLI plugin — URL scraping, batch/crawl, Google/Fast Search SERP, Amazon/Walmart products, YouTube, and ChatGPT from the terminal.

plugins.name: scrapingbee-cli
plugins.description: Official ScrapingBee CLI — one tool for URL scraping (HTML/JS/screenshot/extract), batch & crawl, Google/Fast Search SERP, Amazon/Walmart products & search, YouTube (search/metadata), and ChatGPT prompts. Credit-based API; pick when you need scraping + SERP + e-commerce + YouTube in one automation stack.
